'''Takada Kumano Shrine''' (高田熊野神社, Takada Kumano Jinja) refers to [[Shinto shrines]] named after [[Kumano shrines]].
* {{ill|Takada Kumano Shrine (Kashiwa)|ja|高田熊野神社 (柏市)}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Kashiwa, Chiba|ja|柏市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Takada Kumano Shrine (Chigasaki)|ja|高田熊野神社 (茅ヶ崎市)}} - A shrine located in {{ill|Chigasaki, Kanagawa|ja|茅ヶ崎市}}, Kanagawa Prefecture.
{{aimai}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[Category:original pages]] [[ja:高田熊野神社]] [[category:kk]] [[Category:refresh]]
